title: Owned Inspection, Stable Listing, Release Preview, and Accessible Export
description: Owned inspect fetches remotely when absent, list order follows Map insertion accidents, release mutates before confirmation, and export dumps internal JSON without a version or accessibility structure. Learners cumulatively produce offline collection manager and structured export through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Keep owned inspection offline and return a typed not-owned outcome with explicit next commands.
Sort by documented ID or name policy, label totals and empty state, and retain stable output across reloads.
Construct an immutable preview, validate confirmation against exact identity, then return a new state and release event.
